lore.english: A monstrosity that looks like the combination of a squid and a jellyfish. This mysterious creature appeared one day in both the human world and the Demon Realm. Rumors say that it's an experiment subject that broke out of a research facility, but the truth remains unknown. For now, it's still considered a monster with origins unknown. It swims through the air like water, and swings its tentacles to bind its prey, eating them.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Abyss Tentacle[-]
skills.description:
Stabs a tentacle into the ground, attacking the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Restraint] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1750102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1750102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Stabs a tentacle into the ground, attacking the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Restraint] at a [R:1750102]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1750102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Monster of the Deep[-]
skills.description:
When attacking an enemy in a [&Restraint] state, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1750201]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1750202]%[-] chance. 
When attacking an enemy whose [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], fills the character's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1750202]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1750202]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
When attacking an enemy in a [&Restraint] state, performs a ([V3:1750201]%) [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp] at a [R:1750202]% chance. 
When attacking an enemy whose [&HP] is less than 50%, fills the character's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by ([V3:1750202]%) at a [R:1750202]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Abyss Impact[-]
skills.description:
Extends a tentacle and swings it towards [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll], attacking them.
Reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the targets hit by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1750302]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1750302]%[-] chance.
Inflicts a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1750303]%)[-] [&AccDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1750303]%[-] chance to all enemies whose [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] is less than [&Color_Cyan]30%[-] on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1750303] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Extends a tentacle and swings it towards [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll], attacking them.

Inflicts a ([V3:1750303]%) [&AccDown] at a [R:1750303]% chance to all enemies whose [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] is less than 30% on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
